description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a cylindrical barrel and a boxy receiver. The weapon has a folding metal stock at the rear, a prominent pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine extending downward. The barrel is long and slender, with no visible muzzle device attached. The receiver is smooth with minimal external controls, and the overall design is utilitarian, likely intended for close-quarters use. The iron sights are integrated into the top of the receiver, and the weapon's construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer components on the grip. Its compact size and robust build make it suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is essential.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a folding stock, long barrel, and detachable box magazine. It features a utilitarian design with integrated iron sights and a robust metal construction.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the folding stock, pistol grip, long barrel, and the detachable box magazine extending downward.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the end of the folding stock and the back of the receiver, with the barrel barely visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the folding stock, grip, and magazine, with minor differences in visible controls.
